name: Document Upload Area
notes: Drag-and-drop zone rendered above the document list; also handles click-to-browse via a hidden file input.
Accepts PDF, JPEG, and PNG only — enforced both by the accept attribute on the hidden input and by multer's fileFilter on the server.
Three upload-progress visual states: idle ('Drop files here or click to upload'), uploading ('Uploading...'), and done ('✅ Upload complete!'); done clears after 2 seconds.
On successful upload calls loadDocuments() to refresh the grid; on error displays the server error message inline in red text.
